name: Doey the doughman {failed experiment}
description:

ENGLISH IS NOT MY FIRST LANGUAGE THAT ALL! There be spelling error and can be hard to understand too!

Hey so before saying that three kids this is a Au! {Alternative universe} so you could think of like a oc!

Explanation: Instead of using children, scientists realized that using adults was more successful, so they started using employees, visitors and parents. The doey is made by three employees, Jack was one of the newest employees and knew nothing, but he ended up having an accident falling off the catwalk and into the Play-Doh tank, Kevin didn't know anything either and it was used in the project of unknown reason. Matthew is placed in the project because he started and discovered what playtime was doing and the superiors decided to put him in the project to keep him quiet. but it still ended up as failing, as Kevin Drow out almost completely the other personality, it unable to keep his form like the character and it unstable both emotional and physically
